svg.title: Revised Hostel Outpass System Map
svg.desc: Updated system map with simplified security role and leave form as document upload.

g.text: Simple pass code / QR on phone
Working day detected → system prompts student to upload leave form before submitting
Student gets physical form from department → signs → photographs or scans it → uploads image/PDF when applying
Warden sees the doc inline on the request card and verifies before approving
